response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song '花吹雪' (Hanafubuki). The video contains both a spoken introduction and a full live performance. I have utilized on-screen lyrics and graphics to ensure precise transcription and terminology. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio waveform, and mid-sentence pauses have been handled by splitting blocks for better readability and synchronization.

subtitles.original: こちら、上に上がってきたんですけれども
subtitles.english: I've come up here...

subtitles.original: まぁ上でね、何をやるのかと
subtitles.english: And as for what I'll be doing up here...

subtitles.original: まぁ薄々ちょっと、気づいてるんじゃないかなとは
subtitles.english: Well, I think you might have a slight idea...

subtitles.original: まぁ、思うんですけれども
subtitles.english: ...is what I'm thinking.
Do you know what it is?

subtitles.original: みんな教えて教えて教えて
subtitles.english: Everyone, tell me, tell me, tell me!
What do you all think it is?
What do you think?

subtitles.original: お、もちろんほら私、お、当たってますね、なんと！
subtitles.english: Oh, of course, look at me! Oh, you're right! And—
Yes, here it is!
It's actually this!
Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 新曲『花吹雪』でーす！やったー！
subtitles.english: It's my new song, 'Hanafubuki'! Yay!
Hanafubuki / 2025.09.04 Release

subtitles.original: いやぁもうだいぶ長らくお待たせしたと思うんですけれども
subtitles.english: I think I've kept you waiting for quite a while,

subtitles.original: 余様のオリジナル曲の新しいのはいつだ？みたいなね
subtitles.english: waiting and asking, 'When's the new original song?'

subtitles.original: 感じで待っていたかと思うんですけれども
subtitles.english: I imagine that's how you've been feeling,

subtitles.original: えーこちら、えー作詞・作曲Vellさんに書いていただきました
subtitles.english: well, this song was written and composed by Vell-san.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: テーマはですね、可憐な歌声×和風ロック
subtitles.english: The theme is 'Lovely Vocals x Japanese-style Rock'.

subtitles.original: 可愛いだけじゃない、一味違うオリジナルソングとなっております
subtitles.english: It's an original song that's more than just cute.

subtitles.original: はい、このね、こう綺麗な可憐で重厚な和風ロックとなっておりますので
subtitles.english: Yes, it's a beautiful, lovely, yet heavy rock song,

subtitles.original: メロディとかね、歌詞もこだわり抜いて磨き上げていただいた楽曲となっておりますので
subtitles.english: so the melody and lyrics have been polished with care.

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ皆さん、聴いてください
subtitles.english: So everyone, please, please give it a listen.

subtitles.original: 9月4日0時から、本日の0時からですね
subtitles.english: From September 4th at midnight—tonight at midnight—

subtitles.original: 各種音楽サイトでリリースされるのでぜひ聴いてください
subtitles.english: it'll be out on music sites, so please check it out.

subtitles.original: 聴いてね！いっぱい聴いてね！
subtitles.english: Listen to it! Listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: はい、それでは皆さん、大変長らくお待たせいたしました
subtitles.english: Alright then, everyone, thank you for waiting.

subtitles.original: 最後はこの新曲『花吹雪』で送らせていただきたいと思います
subtitles.english: I'd like to end with my new song, 'Hanafubuki'.

subtitles.original: 感想などもね、この衣装もステージと一緒にポストしてください
subtitles.english: Please post your thoughts on the outfit and stage.

subtitles.original: たくさんポストしてね！
subtitles.english: Post a lot, okay!

subtitles.original: 最後にはですね、メン限パートでちょっと衣装のお写真になったり
subtitles.english: Finally, in the members-only part, I'll show photos,

subtitles.original: 詳しい感じのお話もしたり、ミニライブもありますので
subtitles.english: talk more about it, and have a mini-live,

subtitles.original: そちらの方もぜひぜひ見に来てくれたら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: so I'd be happy if you came to watch that too.

subtitles.original: はい、それでは聴いてください
subtitles.english: Alright then, please listen.
'Hanafubuki'.
To scatter together...
if that is our fate,
let's scatter grandly.
Hanafubuki (Storm of Blossoms)

subtitles.original: ひらひら舞い落ちる空
subtitles.english: Fluttering and dancing down from the sky,
a transient dream that scattered in vain.
A thousand flowers bloom beautifully,
the tryst we fulfill is but a moment.
Dancing glamorously,
the ephemeral life of a butterfly.

subtitles.original: するり堕ちる今宵は何処
subtitles.english: Slipping and falling, where is tonight?
The heavenly wind sways.
Bloom proudly now, almost maddeningly.
To scatter together...
if that is our fate,

subtitles.original: 光満ちた舞台ではない
subtitles.english: not on a stage filled with light.
The melody that tears through the darkness,
fragrant and swaying.
Let's make the dream bloom.
Hanafubuki (Storm of Blossoms)
Dizzying and burning is the flame,
a dream of tomorrow blooming far away.

subtitles.original: 正か否か惑わずに往こう
subtitles.english: Let's go without wondering if it's right or wrong,
keeping the pain of the past in our hearts.
In the twilight,
a single prayer.
The river of tears,
pierced by the echoing voice.

subtitles.original: 慎ましくただ進むだけ
subtitles.english: Simply moving forward with humility.
At the edge of the madder-red sky,

subtitles.original: 褪せた過去の憧れを見る
subtitles.english: I see the faded longings of the past.
In the clear stillness,
connecting to the future.
Searching for an answer,
but finding no sign of one.
